name: Sausage Bread
recipeInstructions:
Can use bakery, homemade or frozen dough (Thawed)
Bring dough to room temperature. Take sausage out of casings and cook well, but do not brown. Drain excess grease. Add Mozzarella to sausage. Add parsley and mix well. Set aside 1 egg yolk. Beat remaining eggs in a separate bowl. Add Romano cheese, salt, and pepper to the eggs. Blend in the sausage mixture. Cut each loaf of bread dough in half and roll out into long narrow strips. Spread 1/4 of the sausage mixture down the center of each strip. Roll up, jelly roll fashion. Seal with egg yolk. Repeat with other dough strips.
Brush loaves with egg yolk. Let rise until doubled in bulk. Bake on a cookie sheet at 350°F until golden brown, 30-45 minutes. Slice loaves to appropriate pieces for serving (may freeze at this point).
